entries.finding: All 5 roadmap tools exist and work, but 6 edge-case gaps remain
entries.detail: Missing blueprint file, roadmap_init has no fallback, roadmap_progress doesn't preserve existing completion_pct, roadmap_next lacks show_blocked, roadmap_deprecate doesn't handle re-deprecation, roadmap_prioritize doesn't auto-create phases

entries.finding: Blueprint file is the critical missing piece
entries.detail: docs/json/roadmaps/opencode-desktop-phase3-roadmap.v1.json doesn't exist — roadmap_init fails without it
